# Staves
# https://revengeofthefallengame.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Staves&prop=wikitext

The staves are the main weapons of the wizard, the mystic and the necromancer. It is focused in high dps at high range.
<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 20px 20px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Speciality</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Primal</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = StaffOfAnnihilation.png
| link = Staff of Annihilation
| text = Staff of Annihilation
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Legendary</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = StaffOfUnholySacrifice.png
| link = Staff of Unholy Sacrifice
| text = Staff of Unholy Sacrifice
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = AnatisStaff.png
| link = Anatis Staff
| text = Anatis Staff
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = HelasPower.png
| link = Hela's Power
| text = Hela's Power
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = GravediggersShovel.png
| link = Gravedigger's Shovel
| text = Gravedigger's Shovel
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Heroic</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = StaffOfExtremePrejudice.png
| link = Staff of Extreme Prejudice
| text = Staff of Extreme Prejudice
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = KoalaPOW.png
| link = KoalaPOW
| text = KoalaPOW
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = BarelyAttunedMagicThingy.png
| link = Barely Attuned Magic Thingy
| text = Barely Attuned Magic Thingy
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = StaffOfTheRisingSun.png
| link = Staff of the Rising Sun
| text = Staff of the Rising Sun
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = StaffOfIceblast.png
| link = Staff of Iceblast
| text = Staff of Iceblast
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = PowerfulTwig.png
| link = Powerful Twig
| text = Powerful Twig
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Artifact</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = ThePhylactery.png
| link = The Phylactery
| text = The Phylactery
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = SentientStaff.png
| link = Sentient Staff
| text = Sentient Staff
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = EdictumPraetoris.png
| link = Edictum Praetoris
| text = Edictum Praetoris
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = HeadOfTheFirebreather.png
| link = Head of the Firebreather
| text = Head of the Firebreather
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = StaffOfNature.png
| link = Staff of Nature
| text = Staff of Nature
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Unique</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = StaffOfTheCrystalSerpent.png
| link = Staff of the Crystal Serpent
| text = Staff of the Crystal Serpent
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = StaffOfEsben.png
| link = Staff of Esben
| text = Staff of Esben
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = StaffOfAdoration.png
| link = Staff of Adoration
| text = Staff of Adoration
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = StaffOfHorrificKnowledge.png
| link = Staff of Horrific Knowledge
| text = Staff of Horrific Knowledge
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = StaffOfYuletideCarols.png
| link = Staff of Yuletide Carols
| text = Staff of Yuletide Carols
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = SweetSugarRushStaff.png
| link = Sweet Sugar Rush Staff
| text = Sweet Sugar Rush Staff
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Galactic</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = StarlightCrook.png
| link = Starlight Crook
| text = Starlight Crook
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Uncommon</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = StaffOfAstralKnowledge.png
| link = Staff of Astral Knowledge
| text = Staff of Astral Knowledge
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = StaffOfTheCosmicWhole.png
| link = Staff of the Cosmic Whole
| text = Staff of the Cosmic Whole
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = StaffOfTheVitalUnity.png
| link = Staff of the Vital Unity
| text = Staff of the Vital Unity
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Normal</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = EnergyStaff.png
| link = Energy Staff
| text = Energy Staff
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = FirebrandStaff.png
| link = Firebrand Staff
| text = Firebrand Staff
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = CometStaff.png
| link = Comet Staff
| text = Comet Staff
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = SerpentineStaff.png
| link = Serpentine Staff
| text = Serpentine Staff
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = MeteorStaff.png
| link = Meteor Staff
| text = Meteor Staff
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = SlayerStaff.png
| link = Slayer Staff
| text = Slayer Staff
}}
|-
| {{ImageBlack
| file = AvengerStaff.png
| link = Avenger Staff
| text = Avenger Staff
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = StaffOfDestruction.png
| link = Staff of Destruction
| text = Staff of Destruction
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = StaffOfHorror.png
| link = Staff of Horror
| text = Staff of Horror
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = StaffOfNecrotic Arcana.png
| link = Staff of Necrotic Arcana
| text = Staff of Necrotic Arcana
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = StaffOfDiabolic Secrets.png
| link = Staff of Diabolic Secrets
| text = Staff of Diabolic Secrets
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = StaffOfTheFundamentalCore.png
| link = Staff of the Fundamental Core
| text = Staff of the Fundamental Core
}}
|}
</div>

<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 20px 20px; padding: 15px;">
